## Summary

-

Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm format-check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm chromium-smoke` when UI/PWA behavior changes

## Privacy, licensing, and performance

- [ ] No production model weights, private audio, speech corpora, transcripts, secrets, or generated build output are committed.
- [ ] Model/data/license implications are documented or not applicable.
- [ ] No new network call is introduced during active transcription.
- [ ] Latency/RTF/memory impact is measured or not applicable.
- [ ] Vercel/cross-origin isolation headers remain compatible with any changed worker/WASM/model behavior.
